# stopProfile

> Stop profiling, save results, and detect hotspots

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| db | Database | yes |
| sessionId | string | yes |

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[session: call findProfileSessionById]
  A --> B[hotspots: call detectHotspots]
  B --> C[updated: call updateProfileSession]
  C --> D[result: return]
```
